$comment: Copy to <project>/.claude/praxarch.json to override praxarch defaults for this project. Every key is optional — omit anything you don't want to override. Project config merges over global (~/.claude/praxarch/config.json), which merges over built-in defaults. To retune a role's MODEL for one project, don't use this file — copy the role's agent file into <project>/.claude/agents/ and change its model frontmatter; project agents shadow user agents by name.

verifyGate.$comment: Thresholds that trigger the Stop-hook verification requirement, and paths excluded from the size calculation.

routeGuard.$comment: strict:false turns hard denials into warnings. securityKeywords are ADDED to the built-in set that forces routing to security-executor. Keywords match whole words case-insensitively; end one with * to match a stem (e.g. "tokeniz*" matches tokenize/tokenizer/tokenization). knownRoles are ADDED to the built-in six roles and treated the same way: their model comes from agent frontmatter, so calls to them must omit `model` — list agents praxarch doesn't install here (e.g. orchestrate-pipeline roles) instead of passing `model` to satisfy the ad-hoc rule.
